title: cyperus helferi
intro: Cyperus helferi, also known as Dwarf Papyrus or Cyperus helferi, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus helferi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyperus helferi is often used in tea, powder, and oil forms to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
